title: Meta-Fiction
description: Pieces with characters who operate above and beyond the fourth wall

title: Sci-Fi
description: Pieces that involve futuristic concepts, advanced technologies, and scientific breakthroughs

title: Horror
description: Pieces exploring various forms of dread, terror, fear, and tension.

title: Satire
description: Pieces that use humorous observation and outright jokes to provide commentary and critique of systems, society, and more

title: Allegory
description: Pieces that convey abstract concepts through narrative storytelling and subtext

title: Speculative Fiction
description: Pieces that involve alternate realities, futures, and hypothetical scenarios
